Defines and manages retained registers for RTC operations, with conditional support for NRF5 microcontrollers.

# Purpose
This C header file defines a set of constants and function prototypes for managing retained registers in a microcontroller environment. The file uses conditional compilation to differentiate between the `MICRO_FAMILY_NRF5` microcontroller family and other families, assigning specific register identifiers for each case. The constants represent various system states and configurations, such as boot bits, reboot reasons, and timezone information, which are stored in backup registers. The file also declares two external functions, [`retained_write`](<#retained_write>) and [`retained_read`](<#retained_read>), which are used to write to and read from these retained registers, respectively. The purpose of these definitions is to facilitate the management of persistent data across system resets.
